description: Grant IPC access to the LUMA bridge commands ONLY to the main window AND ONLY when it is showing the remote LUMA origin. This is the central security control: a stray/injected origin (about:blank, data:, a hijacked redirect, a third-party iframe) cannot invoke native commands because it is not in remote.urls. Custom bridge commands (store_luma_token, start_agent_session, ...) are registered in lib.rs; none of them ever returns the token back to the WebView.
